caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Intensify
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing 17 kt winds with 7.2 ft wave heights and an 88% rain probability, while Bimini in the Bahamas is seeing winds reach 23 kt. I expect these conditions to impact marine activities, with Grand Cayman's high rain probability and moderate winds requiring caution for ships in the area.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing a 38% rain probability with winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 2.2 ft, while Marseille is seeing winds of 21 kt. I am monitoring these conditions closely as they may impact port operations in both Dubrovnik and Marseille, although they do not currently meet the thresholds for any marine wind warnings or significant weather advisories.
